source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ FDA/참조 문서/1. Risk Management/4. Essential Performance Report (Doc No. EPR-01, Rev.0).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Essential Performance Report EPR-01, Rev.0, for IEC 60601-1 testing and risk management evidence.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents essential performance, safety and effectiveness verification, applicable IEC references, measurement methods, acceptance criteria, and accuracy test result data.
keyPoints: The report is for the IEC 60601-1 Test.
Essential performance is described as performance whose absence or degradation would result in unacceptable risk.
The report references IEC 60601-1 [2005] + AM1 [2012] and IEC 60601-2-24 [2015].
The document includes sections for measurement instruments, measurement methods, test information, acceptance criteria, and accuracy test results.

reviewFlags.reason: Product name and model name are placeholders in the document body: 제품명 and 모델명.
Authority or jurisdiction is identified from source metadata and path, but FDA is not stated in the document body.
The document contains inconsistent date signals: approval/preparation dates are 2018.02.10, while revision history date is 2019.02.10.
Test date is incomplete placeholder text: 2019. 00. 00.
Several sections contain template placeholder Korean text rather than completed factual data.
